ddls:
CREATE TABLE "planning_areas" (
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning area */,
  "pa_name" TEXT /* Name of the planning area */,
  "pa_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each planning area */,
  "pa_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the planning area */,
  "pa_latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the planning area */,
  "pa_longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the planning area */,
  "pa_population" INTEGER /* The total population of the planning area */,
  "pa_area_sq_km" REAL /* The area of the planning area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subzones" (
  "sz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subzone */,
  "sz_name" TEXT /* Name of the subzone */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning area the subzone belongs to */,
  "sz_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each subzone */,
  "sz_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the subzone */,
  "sz_latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the subzone */,
  "sz_longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the subzone */,
  "sz_population" INTEGER /* The total population of the subzone */,
  "sz_area_sq_km" REAL /* The area of the subzone in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subzones_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES planning_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0_to_4, 5_to_9) */,
  "age_group_lower_bound" INTEGER /* The lower bound of the age group */,
  "age_group_upper_bound" INTEGER /* The upper bound of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Males, Females) */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_types" (
  "housing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing type */,
  "housing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the housing type (e.g., HDB 1- and 2-Room Flats) */,
  "housing_type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the housing type */,
  "housing_type_capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum number of people that can live in a unit of this housing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning area */,
  "sz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subzone */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "housing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing type */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population_density" REAL /* The population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* The annual population growth rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the population data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_sz_id FOREIGN KEY ("sz_id") REFERENCES subzones ("sz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_housing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_type_id") REFERENCES housing_types ("housing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES planning_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* The title of the data visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the visualization was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* The title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* The date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the role assignment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
